headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.abuseipdb.com; img-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none'
